series_metadata.series_title: MI 39 Poultry Custom Slaughter and Processing Rec
series_metadata.series_description: All custom birds for slaughter and all custom poultry or parts for processing that do not bear the official State of Ohio or the official U.S.D.A. inspection legend must be identified at all times. Information on this form must be maintained in a current status and kept on file at the establishment and must be available to representatives of the Ohio Department of Agriculture and the U. S. Department of Agriculture.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep in files at plant for 3 years from issue date., Paper: Wastepaper
